accounts.name: Claude
accounts.notes: Reads Claude Code OAuth credentials from macOS Keychain and calls Anthropic OAuth usage.

accounts.name: Codex
accounts.notes: Reads local Codex login from ~/.codex/auth.json and asks Codex app-server for usage.

accounts.name: ChatGPT
accounts.notes: Optional local ledger for consumer plans when an official usage API is unavailable.

accounts.name: Copilot
accounts.notes: Optional local ledger; GitHub does not expose personal premium-request quota through the public Copilot metrics API.

accounts.name: OpenCode
accounts.notes: Optional local ledger; OpenCode can use multiple providers with different billing models.
